column1: Need to write a mail account registrar script, with the following requirements:
- work through randomly selected socks5 proxy (the list of proxies is set as a text file).
- mandatory fields (first name, last name, state, etc.) are filled in randomly.
You can use name dictionaries, etc.
The script should have a command line interface, through which you can specify:
- file name with the list of proxies
- output file name with the list of created accounts email:password
- files of additional dictionaries for names, etc.
The script should comment its actions on stdout/stderr, in the following form:
2019-12-04 12:00:00:00 Selected identity data: John Doe, Tallahussy, Texas, jdoe@gmx.com, password 12345
